howItWorks.intro: This gaza reconstruction cost estimator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Total cost = base estimate × destruction percentage
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How much would it cost to rebuild Gaza?
faq.answer: The UN estimated reconstruction costs at $40-80+ billion depending on the extent of destruction. Previous Gaza reconstruction after smaller conflicts cost $4-10 billion and took years due to access restrictions.
